claims.claim: BridgeState initialization and connectivity collapse should make severed lanes explicit when telemetry and sensory booleans are both false.
claims.rationale: `BridgeState::new` already initializes both lane booleans to false and the existing reciprocity test asserts `ConnectivityStatus::Severed` plus severed reciprocity fields.

claims.claim: Messages just beyond the recent window should not be misread as a dead stale state; reciprocity should distinguish waiting from stale.
claims.rationale: Added a boundary test for 10,001ms-old telemetry and sensory messages that asserts `bidirectional_waiting_messages` rather than a stale state.

claims.claim: High-entropy reflective-silence stale-window extensions must still expire so low-frequency active lanes do not become a permanent dead zone.
claims.rationale: Added high-pressure/high-entropy reciprocity coverage showing the 90s reflective-silence extension expires and both lanes become `bidirectional_stale_messages` after the extended window.
